title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat backend.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model manager, RAG, multi-user); rebranded as “Open WebUI”.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper around Ollama with conversation history and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS-Code extension using local Ollama models for inline completions.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example: chunk documents, embed with Ollama, and chat over your data.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; chat, pull, and delete models from JVM applications.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets a server chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n node to integrate local Ollama models into no-code workflows.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop app for chatting with Ollama models (Windows/macOS/Linux).

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C# / .NET client for Ollama with async streaming support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing typed APIs and async tokio client for the Ollama server.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a “Chat with Ollama” pane for AI-assisted note-taking.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot server that listens for @ mentions and replies using an Ollama model.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama container with a chosen model for CI/CD pipelines.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir library wrapping Ollama’s REST API with GenServer-backed clients and streaming.
